meta.title: Dispatch-50 — Tonight's War List vs Snyk

items.title: Stripe Webhook Verification
items.note: Full webhook handler with signature verification. Revenue gate live.

items.title: Supabase Env Vars → Vercel
items.note: SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY confirmed in Vercel 13h ago. CEO completed.

items.title: Auth Gate Before Scan
items.note: Created app/api/deps.py with CurrentUser dependency (Supabase JWT via PyJWT). Injected into submit_scan — unauthenticated POST /api/scans now returns 401.

items.title: CORS Credentials + Wildcard Conflict
items.note: allow_credentials disabled when allow_origins=["*"]. CSRF vector closed.

items.title: Rate Limiting — Free Tier (10/hr)
items.note: Sliding window rate limiter. 10 scans/hr free. 429 + Retry-After header.

items.title: Rate Limiting — Pro Tier (100/hr)
items.note: Pro tier: 100 scans/hr. Upstash Redis primary, in-memory fallback.

items.title: SSRF URL Allowlist
items.note: Only GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Sourcehut accepted. Regex allowlist enforced.

items.title: Temp Dir Path Traversal
items.note: Temp dir prefix no longer embeds scan_id. mkdtemp(prefix='zse-') only.

items.title: Secret Full Redaction
items.note: Zero characters visible. All secrets return [REDACTED] regardless of length.

items.title: GitHub Token Zero-Out
items.note: github_token = None after clone. Token no longer persists in memory.

items.title: Input Validation on repo_url
items.note: Audit confirmed: @field_validator('repo_url') already on ScanRequest in schemas.py:67-82. Validates at Pydantic deserialization = API boundary. Pattern: github.com only. Marked done.

items.title: Data Deletion Endpoint (GDPR)
items.note: Created DELETE /api/user/me. Auth-gated via CurrentUser. delete_user_data() added to database_sqlite.py with CASCADE delete. Returns scans_deleted count. Registered in main.py.

items.title: Scan Result Encryption at Rest
items.note: Scan output stored in plain text in Supabase. Should encrypt findings before upsert.

items.title: Security Headers Middleware
items.note: Created SecurityHeadersMiddleware. Sets X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP, X-XSS-Protection. Registered in main.py before rate limit.

items.title: CVE Detail Concurrency Cap
items.note: MAX_CONCURRENT_DETAIL reduced from 100 to 10. Prevents NVD API hammering.

items.title: ToS + Privacy Policy Pages
items.note: Live product with no ToS or Privacy Policy. Legal exposure. Need /terms and /privacy.

items.title: Real NIST CVSS 3.1 Formula
items.note: Full ISC + Exploitability formula. Scope-conditional. CVSS round-up. Was ±2.3 off.

items.title: NVD Enrichment Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: already implemented correctly. No fix needed.

items.title: Progress Callback Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: already implemented correctly. No fix needed.

items.title: Score Type Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: float return type correct throughout. No fix needed.

items.title: SBOM Await Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: await on SBOM generation correct. No fix needed.

items.title: Dependency Resolver Lockfile Priority
items.note: Lockfile priority partially working. Needs full test coverage and edge case handling.

items.title: CI Repo Dir + Async Callback Already Correct
items.note: Audit confirmed: already correct. No fix needed.

items.title: Scoring Unit Tests
items.note: 15 unit tests covering: weight sum assertion, score floor (never 0), diminishing returns (ordering + delta comparison), clean repo=100, category isolation, score cap <=100, weighted average math, info severity = no deduction.

items.title: Logarithmic Diminishing Returns
items.note: factor = 1/(1+n×0.5) per category/severity. First critical=-15, second=-10, third=-7.5.

items.title: Version Stripping Lockfile Priority
items.note: Audit confirmed: _LOCK_FILES set and seen_eco_dirs logic already prioritises lockfiles.

items.title: SBOM CycloneDX Completeness
items.note: Added _classify_component_type() — library/framework/container. NOASSERTION fallback for unknown licenses. Maven namespace/artifact purl splitting. Framework detection for 18 known names (django, flask, rails, etc.).

items.title: Weight Sum Assertion
items.note: assert abs(sum(_WEIGHTS.values()) - 1.0) < 1e-9 — fails fast if weights drift.

items.title: Vercel Build Config Cleanup
items.note: vercel.json uses legacy 'builds' key. Migrate to framework-native config. Removes build warning.

items.title: requirements.txt Pin All Versions
items.note: Several deps unpinned. Supply chain attack vector. All must be pinned to exact versions.

items.title: Docker Healthcheck
items.note: No HEALTHCHECK instruction. Container orchestrators can't detect unhealthy state.

items.title: GitHub Actions Auto-Deploy
items.note: Push to main → auto-deploy to Vercel production. GitHub Secrets added by CEO.

items.title: Env Var Validation at Startup
items.note: validate_required_env_vars() added to config.py. P0 vars: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY. P1: SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET. strict=True on Vercel/Railway raises RuntimeError. Called in lifespan().

items.title: Login Gate Before Value
items.note: Users can see demo output without signing up. Login wall needed before scan results.

items.title: SSE Real-Time Scan Progress
items.note: No live progress during scan. User sees spinner. SSE stream needed for phase-by-phase output.

items.title: Mobile Responsive Landing
items.note: Landing page breaks on mobile. Score cards overflow. Nav not hamburger-ready.

items.title: Scan History Dashboard
items.note: No scan history page. Users can't compare scores over time. Core retention feature missing.

items.title: Score Trend Chart
items.note: No visual trend chart. Snyk shows score over time. Required for enterprise value prop.

items.title: Empty State Copy
items.note: Empty states say generic text. Should drive action. Elena owns all copy rewrites.

items.title: Error Message UX
items.note: API errors shown as raw JSON in UI. Need human-readable error messages with recovery paths.

items.title: Pricing Page
items.note: No dedicated pricing page. Stripe payment links exist but no conversion page.

items.title: Onboarding Flow
items.note: First-time user has no guided flow. Drop-off after signup. 3-step onboarding needed.

items.title: Export Report as PDF
items.note: Snyk offers PDF export. ZaphScore has no export. Blocks enterprise sales.

items.title: 12-Phase Claim Accuracy
items.note: Marketing says '12-phase scan'. Engine has 7 phases. Fix copy to match reality or build the other 5.

items.title: API Docs Page
items.note: No public API docs. Developers can't integrate. Blocks B2B pipeline. Need /docs with OpenAPI.

items.title: GitHub Badge + README
items.note: No README in zaphscore-engine. No GitHub badge. Looks unmaintained to technical evaluators.

items.title: CEO Name Consistency
items.note: All 'Dario Amodei' references replaced with 'Mario Martinez'. Verified clean.

items.title: Changelog / Release Notes
items.note: No changelog. Users don't know what improved. Snyk publishes release notes. We need this.

items.title: Status Page
items.note: No status page. When API is down users have no info. Blocks enterprise trust.

items.title: Copy Bible Deployment
items.note: ZaphLabs Copy Bible rules not applied to live pages. Elena to audit and rewrite all page copy.
